name: grafana
notes: Simple config, extends stylelint-config-sass-guidelines. Mostly disabled rules.

name: bootstrap
notes: Extends stylelint-config-standard + scss. Uses scss, stylistic, order plugins.

name: material-ui
notes: Pure CSS files. Config hidden in @mui/internal-code-infra.

name: primer-css
notes: GitHub design system. Heavy use of custom Primer plugins.

name: carbon
notes: IBM design system. Very strict config with many plugins.

name: freecodecamp
notes: Most starred repo on GitHub (439k stars). Minimal config with 14 rules, no extends. .stylelintrc.json at root.

name: patternfly
notes: Red Hat design system. 63% SCSS, very strict config. .stylelintrc at root.

name: govuk-frontend
notes: UK Government design system. stylelint.config.js at root.
